news.t: Simplify Launches CTAP ETF, Combining 100% Exposure to Large-Cap U.S. Equities and 100% Exposure to a Systematic Managed Futures Strategy

overview.description: The Simplify US Equity PLUS Managed Futures Strategy ETF (CTAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund blends large-cap US equity exposure with a managed futures overlay that uses long and short futures positions across asset classes. The fund pairs traditional equity investing with trend-following futures implemented through direct and swap-based positions. CTAP was launched on Dec 8, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Launches CTAP ETF, Combining 100% Exposure to Large-Cap U.S. Equities and 100% Exposure to a Systematic Managed Futures Strategy
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management (“Simplify”), a leading provider of Exchange Traded Funds (“ETFs”), today announced the launch of the Simplify US Equity PLUS Managed Futures Strat...
